Title: Relates to the scope of quasi-judicial immunity of referees in mortgage foreclosure actions
Summary: Clarifies and codifies the limits of quasi-judicial immunity applicable to referees appointed in mortgage foreclosure actions; ensures accountability for misconduct and ultra vires acts.
LawSection: Real Property Actions and Proceedings Law
LawCode: Add §1354-a, amd §1355, RPAP L; amd R4311, CPLR
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the real property actions and proceedings law, in relation to the scope of quasi-judicial immunity of referees in mortgage foreclosure actions
